_meta.author: mikolajdobrucki
_meta.title: CTA with Rectangle
_meta.description:
A powerful Call-to-Action component built with shadcn's design system.

This component features multiple styles including box layouts and beam effects, all following shadcn's minimalist aesthetic. Each variant is designed to create compelling call-to-action sections that drive user engagement.

Built with Tailwind CSS, it ensures responsive design and seamless integration with other shadcn components. The component maintains high accessibility standards while providing flexibility in how you present your calls to action.
